# matomo Provider



## Example Usage

```terraform
provider "matomo" {
  base_url  = "https://analytics.example.com"
  api_token = var.matomo_api_token
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `api_token` (String, Sensitive) Matomo API token (token_auth). May also be set via the MATOMO_API_TOKEN environment variable.
- `base_url` (String) Base URL of the Matomo instance, e.g. https://analytics.example.com. May also be set via the MATOMO_BASE_URL environment variable.
- `insecure_skip_verify` (Boolean) Skip TLS certificate verification. Only use for self-hosted instances with internal CAs.
